body: closes #122 - This PR adds more tests for `Writers.target_coordinates` and `Writers.hcoords_from_horizontal_space`. Furthermore, this PR also fix a bug when working with a box domain as `num_points` was being interpreted as Lat-Long-Z instead of Long-Lat-Z. Finally, the latest version of Documenter is used and ClimaCore is added as a dependency to make the documentation for NetCDFWriter available to Documenter.
title: Add more tests and fix bugs
